Name: Great Fireball
Comment: Kills all monsters except for bosses in the range

Name: Volatile Blast
What it does: GFB deals 50% boss max HP as bonus damage
Comment: always hits boss when Great Fireball is active

Name: Additional GFBs
What it does: While casting GFB, you cast an additional 1

Name: Ultimate Explosion
What it does: Kills all the monsters except for bosses
Comment: Cooldown - 5 min, doesn't work on bosses

Name: Auto Ultimate Explosion
Comment: Same as auto fireball or attack

Name: Increase min and max damage
What it does: Increase both min and max damage

Name: Power Stance
What it does: Temporarily grants huge attack and attack speed boost
Comment: Gives +15 max damage, +15 min damage, +50% attack speed for 90 seconds. 6 minute cooldown
